author: nottherealtar
install_msg: Run `[p]serverassistant` or `/serverassistant` for grouped help. Recommended: `[p]serverassistant log set #mod-log`, then configure `[p]serverassistant antispam` if you want rate limits. Color picker needs `[p]serverassistant createcolorroles` first.
name: ServerAssistant
short: Server management, moderation, and anti-spam tools
description: Server management: moderation (timed mute via timeout or Muted role), slowmode, lock/unlock, mod log, anti-spam, autorole, verification, color roles, announce + embed announce, polls, leveling, starboard, reaction roles, role menus (select), plus user/role/server stats and channel map.
end_user_data_statement: Stores per-guild settings (log, anti-spam, color picker, verification IDs, leveling options, starboard, reaction-role maps, role-menu messages) and per-member leveling XP only. No message logs or full profiles.
